history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person, silhouetted against a vibrant sunset, stands on a sandy beach. Their head is tilted back, gazing upwards at the sky. Gentle waves lap at the shore, creating ripples that reflect the warm hues of the setting sun. The sky is a spectacle of color, transitioning from a deep orange and yellow near the horizon to soft pinks and blues higher up, with streaks of clouds adding texture. The overall atmosphere is serene and contemplative, with the warm, soft lighting of the sunset casting a tranquil mood. The image is captured in a realistic style with a focus on the natural beauty of the scene.
